data_sources.notes: Master registry with status flags (COMPLETE/PARTIAL/STUB/ASSETS_ONLY). Some entries have _phantom_assets flag.
Point counts vary wildly (10-5451). Some phantom DXF references.
Used for vectorizer scale validation. Waist position varies by family.
Central source for body validation. Uses dataclasses BodyDimensions, FeatureRoutes.
Zone-specific curve thresholds for outline reconstruction.
Registry of all 19 instrument models with get_spec() functions.
Standard body template dimensions with CNC feature info.
Neck profile shapes, not instrument-specific.
221 lines. Variants: vintage, modern, 24fret.
591 lines. Full body outline (669 points), carved top profile, CNC operations (OP20-OP63).
448 lines. Variants: original_1958, reissue_76. DXF has 24 points (needs refinement).
261 lines. Split-V headstock, V-shaped angular body.
135 lines. Student model, single-cutaway, slab body.
591 lines. Vectorizer extracted with 2,011 primitives, 35 bracing features.
485 lines. Carlos Jumbo body scale + Benedetto construction method.
AI vision extracted from Benedetto photos. 482.6mm length x 431.8mm lower_bout.
25 lines only. Tier 1 but pending DXF verification. Schema mismatch with loader.py.
234.6mm width x 321.6mm height. 4 single strings, 17 frets.
280.0mm width x 380.0mm height. 10 strings (5 courses), 19 frets.
1,026 lines. Most detailed Smart Guitar spec. Full IoT integration, Arduino, Raspberry Pi 5.
CNC toolpath generation configuration. Tool configs, machine profiles.
Uses inches (legacy unit system). Set-neck pocket specs with 4 degree angle.

gen_consolidation.evidence: stratocaster_body_generator.py has from_project() at line 92. lespaul_body_generator.py has from_project() at line 44. acoustic_body_generator.py has from_project() at line 206. body_generator.py dispatcher calls these at lines 108, 113, 118.
body_gcode_router.py exists with /stratocaster/body/gcode, /les_paul/body/gcode, /flying_v/body/gcode endpoints. However, no grep matches for project_id in body gcode routes.

gen_consolidation.description: Consolidate spec stubs + registry + generator configs
gen_consolidation.evidence: MODEL_SPECS in guitars/__init__.py has 19 entries. instrument_model_registry.json has 31 entries. Multiple overlapping data sources identified. No consolidation script or migration found.
blocking_gaps: Multiple dimension sources with conflicting values
No single source of truth established

gen_consolidation.evidence: acoustic_body_generator.py produces both outline AND G-code. Has generate_outline(), generate_perimeter_gcode(), generate_soundhole_gcode(), generate_binding_channel_gcode() methods. Supports 8 styles: dreadnought, jumbo, om/000, oo/00, parlor, classical, j45, gibson_l_00.

standalone_features.notes: Uses ezdxf inline (R12). Full feature with 6+ API routers and multiple Vue components.
Uses ezdxf directly (R12). Exports CENTERLINE, MALE_CUT, POCKET_CUT layers.
Uses dxf_writer.py for spiral geometry. Connects to acoustic_body_volume.py. 161 tests.
Pure calculation library using scipy.optimize. No API endpoint, no UI. Solves for thickness given target frequencies.
Referenced by body_generator.py and acoustic_body_generator.py. 19 body outlines extracted from DXF.
Embedded in soundhole calculator. Computes Helmholtz resonance frequency, multiport analysis.

dxf_compliance.notes: THE STANDARD. R12 (AC1009), LINE only, 3dp precision.
Blueprint pipeline writer. R12, POLYLINE2D + LINE fallback.
Blueprint import cleaner. R12 output standard.
Validation router. R12 for validation output.
Uses R2000, LWPOLYLINE. Listed in CLAUDE.md as needing refactor.
Uses R2000. Listed in CLAUDE.md as needing refactor.
Smart Guitar DXF. Uses R2000, LWPOLYLINE.
CRITICAL VIOLATION. Uses R2010, LWPOLYLINE. Bypasses standard.
Bezier body generator. Uses R2010, LWPOLYLINE.
Compatibility layer. Creates R12-R2010 documents adaptively.
